NAVAREA XIX 48/21
ANDOYA SPACE CONDUCT NAVAL OPERATIONS FROM 03 TO 12 MAY 21
MARITIME TRAFFIC REQUEST TO BE AWARE OF FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS

AREA ROMEO, 1900 TO 0200 UTC DAILY FROM 04 TO 06 MAY 
A. 68-49N 15-46E
B. 68-53N 15-39E
C. 69-00N 15-44E
D. 69-03N 15-55E
E. 69-12N 16-12E
F. 69-19N 16-12E
G. 69-25N 16-04E
H. 69-38N 16-17E
I. 69-30N 16-48E

L. 68-54N 16-13E
M. 68-50N 16-04E
CHARTS 79, 80, 81, 82, 85, 311, 312

AREA TANGO, 1900 TO 0200 UTC FROM 03 TO 12 MAY 
A. 69-30.7N 16-03.6E

C. 69-22.9N 16-41.1E

GUNEX, 1100 TO 1400 UTC DAILY FROM 04 TO 7 MAY 
A. 69-17.8N 16-33.0E
B. 69-16.0N 16-53.9E
C. 69-09.9N 16-41.7E
D. 69-11.8N 16-34.8E
E. 69-15.1N 16-31.2E
CHARTS 81, 82, 312
DURING THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PERIODS, MARITIM TRAFFIC IS REQUEST TO AVOID THE NOTIFIED DANGER AREAS, 
OR CONTACT ANDOYA SPACE FOR COORDINATION. PHONE +47 76144582, MARITIME VHF CANNEL 16 AND 14.
REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 08/21
